zh.title: 案例分享：案外人误转资金至被执行人账户，能否排除执行？
zh.lead: 在民事执行程序中，执行程序中，案外人因操作失误将款项转入被执行人账户的情形并不少见。此类纠纷的争议焦点在于：“误转”款项是否属于被执行人责任财产？案外人能否通过执行异议程序排除执行？本文结合本所律师代理的一个成功回款的执行案件，解析此类案件的法律规则及实务要点。

blocks.text: 案情简介：50万元货款误转被执行人账户，案外人异议被驳回
在王先生与施某买卖合同纠纷一案中，施某未履行生效法律文书确定的支付义务，于是王先生委托本所律师代为提起强制执行申请。
在执行过程中，施某名下某银行的存款账户被法院冻结。案外人詹某、陈某因与施某之子施小某有业务往来，需支付货款，2025年1月，詹某委托其妻陈某向施小某账户转账50万元，于是，陈某向施某账户转账50万元，附言“灵芝粉款”，意图让施某代施小某收款。因施某账户被冻结，款项无法转出，交易中止。詹某、陈某以转账错误为由，向法院提出执行异议，要求原路退回50万元货款。
争议焦点：
误转款项是否仍属施某责任财产？
案外人能否以“误转”为由排除执行？
律师直击要害：从货币权属到证据规则，三大抗辩筑牢执行防线
货币的“占有即所有”规则——涉案款项所有权已发生转移，属于被执行人施某的可供执行的财产
根据《最高人民法院关于人民法院办理执行异议和复议案件若干问题的规定》第二十五条第一款第（三）项，银行存款的权属以账户登记名称为准。货币作为种类物，遵循“占有即所有”原则，一旦转入被执行人账户即视为其责任财产，法院可依法执行。
误转行为的证明责任——案外人詹某和陈某夫妇提供的证据不足以证明此次转款是误转
陈某明知转入账户为施某所有，其提供的银行账户交易记录仅仅能证明存在转账行为，但无法证明系误转，陈荣平在明知收款方为施深根却仍选择转账的情况下，自称此次转账行为系“误转”，并不符合常理，且转账附言“灵芝粉款”未明确代收性质，故案涉50万元归属施某，属于可执行财产。
法院裁判核心：为何“误转”主张无法阻却执行？

法院认为，《最高人民法院关于人民法院办理执行异议和复议案件若干问题的规定》第二十五条第一款第三项的规定，“案外人对人民法院强制执行的银行存款提出执行异议的，人民法院应当按照金融机构登记的账户名称判断执行异议人是否系权利人。”本案中，被执行人施某有未履行完毕的执行案件，法院冻结被执行人施某的存款账户符合法律规定。案外人詹某、陈某所称的汇入被执行人施某的存款账户内的50万元货款，其在转账前已知晓汇入的账户为被执行人名下银行账户，该行为并不属于错汇、误汇，其主张该款归其所有，无法律依据，法院不予支持。据此，法院驳回了案外人詹某、陈某的异议请求。
执行效果：最终，该50万元货款全部用于执行，王先生债权全额实现！本案于2025年2月执行结案。
律师实务指南：如何防范误转风险？遭遇执行异议该如何应对？
误转资金的救济路径
执行异议程序
该程序仅适用于对执行标的享有物权或特殊债权的案外人，因本案中资金进入施某账户后已与其他款项混同，不具有特定化，在事实上无法返还“原物”，无权主张“原物返还”。普通债权（如本案不当得利）无法排除执行。
另诉主张不当得利
根据《最高人民法院关于适用执行程序若干问题的解释》第十四条之规定，詹某、陈某以误转的不当得利请求之债权请求为由，无法请求排除以物权为基础的强制执行行为。
案外人可另案起诉被执行人要求返还款项，但需与其他债权人平等受偿，无优先性。
特殊情形突破“占有即所有”的可能性
若误转款项满足以下条件，案外人可能排除执行：
专款专用账户：如农民工工资专户、保证金账户等，资金具有特定用途且未混同；
账户被特定化：款项进入账户后未被使用，且与被执行人其他资金区分；
明确代收合意：案外人与被执行人签订代收协议，且第三人（实际收款方）确认代收事实。
风险防范建议
转账前双重确认：核对账户名称、账号、开户行，避免仅凭“亲属关系”或“历史交易”盲目转账。
备注明确用途：如为代收代付，应在转账附言中注明“代XX收款”，并留存书面协议、聊天记录等证据。
及时采取保全措施：发现误转后立即报警、申请账户冻结，防止款项被划扣。

references: 《中华人民共和国民事诉讼法》
《最高人民法院关于适用<中华人民共和国民事诉讼法>执行程序若干问题的解释》
《最高人民法院关于人民法院办理执行异议和复议案件若干问题的规定》
zh.conclusion:
误转款项能否排除执行，核心在于资金权属认定及案外人权利性质。货币的“占有即所有”规则具有普适性，案外人仅凭“误转”主张排除执行难获支持。企业和个人在交易中应重视账户合规管理，发生纠纷时及时寻求专业法律帮助，通过精准的法律策略维护权益。
关注我们，获取更多执行异议与救济实务指南！
（本文案例及观点供实务参考，具体案件需结合管辖法院规则分析。）

en.title: Case sharing: Can the execution be ruled out if an outsider wrongly transfers funds to the account of the person subjected to execution?
en.lead: In the civil execution procedure, it is not uncommon for an outsider to transfer funds to the account of the person subjected to execution due to operational errors in the execution procedure.The focus of such disputes is: whether the "wrongly transferred" money belongs to the property of the person subjected to execution?Can an outsider rule out enforcement through the enforcement objection procedure?This article analyzes the legal rules and practical essentials of such cases in light of a successful collection enforcement case represented by our lawyers.

blocks.text: Brief introduction to the case: the payment for goods of 500000 yuan was wrongly transferred to the account of the person subjected to execution, and the objection of the outsider was rejected

In the case of a dispute over a sales contract between Mr. Wang and Mr. Shi, Mr. Shi failed to perform the payment obligation specified in the effective legal document, so Mr. Wang entrusted the lawyer of the firm to file an application for enforcement on his behalf.

In the course of execution, the deposit account of a bank under the name of Shi was frozen by the court.The outsiders, Zhan and Chen, need to pay for the goods due to their business dealings with Shi Xiaomou, Shi's son. In January 2025, Zhan entrusted his wife, Chen, to transfer 500000 yuan to Shi Xiaomou's account. Therefore, Chen transferred 500000 yuan to Shi's account with a postscript of "Ganoderm Powder", intending to let Shi collect money on behalf of Shi Xiaomou.Due to the freezing of Shi's account, the funds cannot be transferred out, and the transaction is suspended.Zhan and Chen raised an objection to the execution to the court on the grounds of wrong transfer and requested the original route to refund 500000 yuan.
Focus of dispute:
Does the amount transferred by mistake still belong to the property of Shi?
Can an outsider rule out enforcement on the grounds of" wrongful transfer "?
Lawyers hit the nail on the head: from the ownership of currency to the rules of evidence, the three defenses build a strong line of defense for enforcement
The" possession is ownership "rule of money-the ownership of the money involved has been transferred and belongs to the enforceable property of Shi A of the person subjected to execution

According to Item (3) of Paragraph 1 of Article 25 of the Provisions of the Supreme People's Court on Several Issues Concerning the Handling of Cases of Objection to Execution and Reconsideration by People's Courts, the ownership of bank deposits shall be subject to the registered name of the account.As a kind of thing, currency follows the principle of "possession is ownership", and once transferred to the account of the person subjected to execution, it shall be regarded as its responsible property, which can be executed by the court according to law.
The burden of proof for the act of wrongful transfer - the evidence provided by the outsiders, Mr. and Mrs. Zhan and Mr. Chen, is insufficient to prove that the transfer is wrongful

Chen clearly knows that the transfer account is owned by Shi, and the bank account transaction records provided by him can only prove that there is a transfer, but cannot prove that it is a transfer by mistake. Chen Rongping, knowing that the payee is Shi Shengen but still chooses to transfer, claims that the transfer is a" transfer by mistake ", which does not conform to the common sense, and the nature of collection is not specified in the postscript of the transfer," Ganoderm Powder ". Therefore, 500000 yuan involved in the case belongs to Shi, which is an enforceable property.
The core of the judgment of the court: Why can the claim of" wrongful transfer "not prevent the execution?

The court considers that Item 3 of Paragraph 1 of Article 25 of the Provisions of the Supreme People's Court on Several Issues Concerning the Handling of Cases of Objection to Execution and Reconsideration by People's Courts stipulates that" If an outsider raises an objection to the execution of a bank deposit enforced by the people's court, the people's court shall judge whether the objector to execution is the obligee according to the account name registered by the financial institution. "In this case, Shi A, the person subjected to execution, has an enforcement case that has not been completed, and the court's freezing of the deposit account of Shi A, the person subjected to execution, conforms to the provisions of law.For the payment of 500000 yuan remitted into the deposit account of Shi A, the person subjected to execution, as mentioned by the outsiders, Zhan and Chen, before the transfer, they know that the remitted account is the bank account under the name of the person subjected to execution, and the act does not belong to wrong remittance or wrong remittance. The court shall not support their claim that the payment belongs to them without legal basis.On this basis, the court rejected the objection request of outsiders Zhan and Chen.
Execution effect: Eventually, all the 500000 yuan of payment for goods will be used for execution, and Mr WANG's creditor's rights will be realized in full!The case was closed in February 2025.
Practice Guide for Lawyers: How to Prevent the Risk of Mistransfer?How should we deal with objections to enforcement?
Relief route for transfer of funds by mistake
Execution of Objection Procedure

This procedure is only applicable to outsiders who enjoy real rights or special creditor's rights over the subject matter of execution. As the funds in this case have been mixed with other funds after entering the account of Shi A, they are not specific and cannot return the" original object "in fact, and have no right to claim the" original object return ".Execution of ordinary claims (such as unjust enrichment in the case) cannot be excluded.
Claim of unjust enrichment in a separate action

According to the provisions of Article 14 of the Interpretation of the Supreme People's Court on Several Issues Concerning the Application of Enforcement Procedures, Zhan and Chen are unable to request the exclusion of compulsory execution on the basis of property rights on the grounds of claims for wrongful transfer of claims for unjust enrichment.
An outsider may bring a suit against the person subjected to execution in another case to demand the return of money, but he shall be compensated equally with other creditors without priority.
Special circumstances break through the possibility of" possession is ownership "
If the transfer by mistake meets the following conditions, the outsider may exclude the execution:
Special accounts for special funds: such as special accounts for migrant workers' wages and deposit accounts, etc. The funds have specific purposes and are not confused;
Account is specified: the money is not used after entering the account and is distinguished from other funds of the person subjected to execution;
Clear collection agreement: the outsider and the person subjected to execution sign a collection agreement, and the third party (the actual payee) confirms the fact of collection.
Risk prevention suggestions
Double confirmation before transfer: check the account name, account number and opening bank to avoid blind transfer only based on" kinship "or" historical transaction ".

Remarks specify the purpose: If it is collected and paid on behalf of others, it shall indicate" collect on behalf of XX "in the postscript of the transfer, and keep written agreements, chat records and other evidence.
Timely take preservation measures: immediately report to the police and apply for account freezing after discovering the wrong transfer to prevent the funds from being deducted.

en.conclusion: Whether the transfer of funds by mistake can exclude the execution lies in the determination of the ownership of funds and the nature of the rights of outsiders.The "possession is ownership" rule of currency is universal, and it is difficult for outsiders to support the exclusion of execution only by claiming "wrongful transfer".Enterprises and individuals should attach importance to account compliance management in transactions, seek professional legal assistance in a timely manner in case of disputes, and safeguard their rights and interests through accurate legal strategies.\N Follow us for more practical guidelines on enforcement objections and remedies!\N (The cases and viewpoints in this article are for practical reference, and the specific cases need to be analyzed in combination with the rules of the competent court.）
